data.name: ColumnHeaderAdditionalWorkload
data.comment: Column header text for the column showing the recent additional workload of regressed queries. {0} is the metric with the extra workload.

data.name: ColumnHeaderExecCount
data.comment: short form to say "number of executions"

data.name: ColumnHeaderExecutionType
data.comment: short form to say "execution type". The types of execution could be "regular", "canceled", or "exception".

data.name: ColumnHeaderFirstExecTime
data.comment: short form to say "first execution time"

data.name: ColumnHeaderLastExecTime
data.comment: short form to say "last execution time"

data.name: ColumnHeaderMetricTime
data.comment: Column header used for execution count. {0} is the metric and {1} is the time interval. For example "Execution Count Recent" where {0} is "Execution Count" and {1} is "Recent"

data.name: ColumnHeaderNumPlans
data.comment: short form to say "number of plans"

data.name: ColumnHeaderPlanForced
data.comment: short form to say "value of the is_forced_plan field"

data.name: ColumnHeaderPlanForceFailureCount
data.comment: short form to say "how many times did forcing the plan fail"

data.name: ColumnHeaderQuerySQLText
data.comment: short form to say "SQL Text for a query"

data.name: ColumnHeaderRegrPercRecent
data.comment: short form to say "Regression percentage during the recent time interval". {0} is the metric that the regression is measured against.

data.name: ColumnHeaderStatMetric
data.comment: for example "Avg. Cpu Time" where {0} is Avg and {1} is "CPU Time"

data.name: ColumnHeaderStatMetricTime
data.comment: {0} is the statistic. {1} is the metric. {2} is the time interval. For example "avg duration recent" where {0} is avg and {1} is duration and {2} is recent

data.name: ColumnHeaderToolTip
data.value: Click to sort by this column
data.comment: Tooltip hinting the user that clicking on this column header will sort the table based on this column.

data.name: ColumnHeaderWaitCategoryDesc
data.comment: Name of the column shown in grid view of Query Wait Statistics report

data.name: ColumnHeaderWaitCategoryId
data.comment: Name of the column shown in grid view of Query Wait Statistics report

data.name: HistoryLabelText
data.comment: Label for history time interval selection in the query store configuration dialog. History here represents a time interval that is relatively long in length. The history time interval will also be used as a baseline which the statistics in recent time interval will be compared against.

data.name: InvalidArgumentMessage
data.value: Invalid statistic selection for GetSummary. Statistic = '{0}' Metric = '{1}'.
data.comment: Exception message for invalid argument selection.

data.name: InvalidContainingObject
data.comment: Error message displayed when containing object no longer exists

data.name: InvalidQueryUnderContainingObject
data.value: -- Containing object no longer contains the selected query text.
data.comment: Error message displayed when containing object no longer contains query text

data.name: MetricOptionClrTime
data.comment: Label text for the metric option that keeps track of the CLR time for the query plan

data.name: MetricOptionCPUTime
data.comment: Label text for the metric option that keeps track of the amount of time the CPU has taken to execute a query.

data.name: MetricOptionDop
data.comment: Label text for the metric option that keeps track of DOP (degree of parallelism) for the query plan

data.name: MetricOptionDuration
data.comment: Label text for the metric option that keeps track of the total amount of wall clock time a query has taken to execute.

data.name: MetricOptionExecutions
data.comment: Label text for the metric option that keeps track of how many times a query has executed within a certain time interval.

data.name: MetricOptionLogicalReads
data.comment: Label text for the metric option that keeps track of the number of logical reads used by a query execution.

data.name: MetricOptionLogicalWrites
data.comment: Label text for the metric option that keeps track of the number of logical writes used by a query execution.

data.name: MetricOptionLogMemoryUsed
data.comment: Label text for the metric option that keeps track of the number of bytes in the database log used by the query plan

data.name: MetricOptionMemoryConsumption
data.comment: Label text for the metric option that keeps track of amount of memory used by a query execution.

data.name: MetricOptionPhysicalReads
data.comment: Label text for the metric option that keeps track of the number of physical disc reads used by a query execution.

data.name: MetricOptionQueryWaitTime
data.comment: Label text for the metric option that keeps track of wait time used for the query plan

data.name: MetricOptionRowcount
data.comment: Label text for the metric option that keeps track of the number of rows returned for the query plan

data.name: MetricOptionTempDbMemoryUsed
data.comment: Label text for the metric option that keeps track of the temp db memory used for the query plan

data.name: MetricOptionWithUnitsTemplate
data.comment: Template for displaying metric options with its units. {0} is the metric text. {1} is the unit. Ex: Duration (μs).

data.name: MetricsNotAvailableInTargetDb
data.comment: Error message when UI is unable to locate any available metrics in the target database.

data.name: QueryIDSearchColumnHeaderQueryID
data.comment: Column header for the Query ID Search Window.

data.name: QueryStoreReadOnlyReason_DbInEmergencyMode
data.comment: Reason why QDS is (must be) in read-only mode - Database is in emergency mode.

data.name: QueryStoreReadOnlyReason_DbInLogAcceptMode
data.value: Database is in log accept mode.
data.comment: Reason why QDS is (must be) in read-only mode - Database is in log accept mode.

data.name: QueryStoreReadOnlyReason_DbInSingleUserMode
data.comment: Reason why QDS is (must be) in read-only mode - Database is in single-user mode.

data.name: QueryStoreReadOnlyReason_DbReadOnly
data.comment: Reason why QDS is (must be) in read-only mode - Database is in read-only mode.

data.name: QueryStoreReadOnlyReason_DiskSizeLimit
data.value: Query store has reached disk size limit.
data.comment: Reason why QDS is (must be) in read-only mode - Query store has reached disk size limit.

data.name: QueryStoreReadOnlyReason_StmtHashMapMemoryLimit
data.value: Query store statement hash map has reached memory limit.
data.comment: Reason why QDS is (must be) in read-only mode - Query store statement hash map has reached memory limit.

data.name: QueryStoreReadOnlyToolTip
data.value: Query Store is operating in READ_ONLY mode.

data.name: RecentLabelText
data.comment: Label for recent time interval selection in the query store configuration dialog. Recent here typically represents a time interval that has just recently occurred and is short in length.

data.name: ReplicaOptionGeoSecondary
data.comment: Label text for GeoSecondary replica

data.name: ReplicaOptionGeoHASecondary
data.comment: Label text for GeoHASecondary replica

data.name: ReplicaOptionPrimary
data.comment: Label text for Primary replica

data.name: ReplicaOptionSecondary
data.comment: Label text for Secondary replica

data.name: StatisticsOptionAvg
data.comment: Text for the statistic option Average. When appropriate, use abbreviated form for shortened length.

data.name: StatisticsOptionLast
data.comment: Text for the statistic option Last

data.name: StatisticsOptionMax
data.comment: Text for the statistic option Maximum. When appropriate, use abbreviated form for shortened length.

data.name: StatisticsOptionMin
data.comment: Text for the statistic option Minimum. When appropriate, use abbreviated form for shortened length.

data.name: StatisticsOptionStddev
data.comment: Text for the statistic option Standard Deviation. When appropriate, use abbreviated form for shortened length.

data.name: StatisticsOptionTotal
data.comment: Text for the statistic option Total for regressed queries pane. This statistic represents the total amount of time a query regression in recent has caused. This statistic is calculated as (Average duration in Recent – Average duration in History) * Number of execution in Recent.

data.name: TimeIntervalOptionAuto
data.comment: Indicate "automatic" selection of time interval

data.name: TimeIntervalOptionDay
data.comment: An interval of time equal to a day

data.name: TimeIntervalOptionHour
data.comment: An interval of time equal to an hour

data.name: TimeIntervalOptionMinute
data.comment: An interval of time equal to a minute

data.name: TimeIntervalOptionMonth
data.comment: An interval of time equal to a month

data.name: TimeIntervalOptionsCustomPaneHeaderText
data.comment: Text used in pane headers for custom time interval to ensure proper grammar. Sample pane header title: Top 25 regressed queries during the custom time interval for database TestDB.

data.name: TimeIntervalOptionWeek
data.comment: An interval of time equal to a week

data.name: TimeIntervalPaneHeader
data.comment: Localized string for Time Interval. For E.g. Last 30 minutes ending at 2/5/2017 5:30 PM

data.name: TotalWaitCategoryTime
data.comment: Text for Total wait time {0} will be replaced with wait category. network, cpu, memory etc.

data.name: UnitKilobyte
data.comment: Unit symbol for kilobyte

data.name: UnitMicrosecond
data.comment: Unit symbol for microsecond.

data.name: UnitMillisecond
data.comment: Unit symbol for millisecond.

data.name: StatisticsOptionVariation
data.comment: Text for the statistic option Variation

data.name: ReplicaNameNotNullEmpty
data.value: ReplicaName cannot be Null or Empty
